auth-platforms.name: Kinde
auth-platforms.description: Developer-focused auth and billing platform with generous flat pricing and B2B org features.

auth-platforms.name: Keycloak
auth-platforms.description: Mature open-source identity and access management server with SAML, SSO, and LDAP federation.

auth-platforms.name: ZITADEL
auth-platforms.description: API-first, multi-tenant open-source identity platform with passkeys, SSO, and self-hosting.

auth-platforms.name: Ory
auth-platforms.description: Cloud-native, modular IAM stack (Kratos, Hydra, Keto) for distributed and Kubernetes deployments.

auth-platforms.name: SuperTokens
auth-platforms.description: Open-source authentication with prebuilt UI and self-hostable or managed core service.

auth-platforms.name: FusionAuth
auth-platforms.description: Single-tenant identity platform that is free to self-host with deep customization and standards support.

auth-platforms.name: Descope
auth-platforms.description: Drag-and-drop authentication platform for building passwordless and CIAM flows visually.

auth-platforms.name: Amazon Cognito
auth-platforms.description: AWS-native user pools and identity federation that integrate deeply with the AWS ecosystem.

auth-platforms.name: Hanko
auth-platforms.description: Open-source, passkey-first authentication with embeddable web components and self-hosting.

auth-platforms.name: Authelia
auth-platforms.description: Open-source authentication and SSO portal that adds 2FA in front of reverse proxies.

payments.name: Mollie
payments.description: European payments platform with broad local methods and a clean, developer-friendly API.

payments.name: Checkout.com
payments.description: Enterprise payments processor with global acquiring, fraud tooling, and unified APIs.

payments.name: FastSpring
payments.description: Merchant-of-record platform handling global tax, subscriptions, and digital product sales.

payments.name: Recurly
payments.description: Subscription management and recurring billing platform with dunning and revenue recovery.

payments.name: Square
payments.description: Commerce platform combining in-person and online payments with developer APIs.

payments.name: PayPal
payments.description: Ubiquitous consumer wallet and checkout with broad buyer trust and global reach.

payments.name: Creem
payments.description: Merchant-of-record payment platform aimed at indie SaaS and AI startups.

payments.name: Dodo Payments
payments.description: Merchant-of-record API for global digital sales, tax handling, and subscriptions.

payments.name: Stripe Connect
payments.description: Stripe's platform product for marketplaces handling onboarding, payouts, and split payments.

payments.name: Worldpay
payments.description: Large-scale enterprise payment processor with global acquiring and omnichannel support.

email-apis.name: MailerSend
email-apis.description: Transactional email API and SMTP relay with a drag-and-drop template builder.

email-apis.name: SMTP2GO
email-apis.description: Reliable SMTP and API email delivery service with global sending infrastructure.

email-apis.name: SparkPost
email-apis.description: High-volume email delivery and analytics platform now part of MessageBird/Bird.

email-apis.name: Mailjet
email-apis.description: Transactional and marketing email API with collaborative template editing.

email-apis.name: Elastic Email
email-apis.description: Low-cost email delivery API and SMTP service for high-volume senders.

email-apis.name: Mailchimp Transactional
email-apis.description: Transactional email API (formerly Mandrill) bolted onto the Mailchimp marketing suite.

email-apis.name: SendPulse
email-apis.description: Multichannel platform offering transactional email API alongside SMS and chatbots.

email-apis.name: Courier
email-apis.description: Notification API that orchestrates email plus SMS, push, and chat through one interface.

email-apis.name: MailPace
email-apis.description: Privacy-focused transactional email API with fast sending and a simple developer interface.

feature-flags.name: Split
feature-flags.description: Feature delivery platform pairing flags with built-in experimentation and metric impact tracking.

feature-flags.name: Optimizely Feature Experimentation
feature-flags.description: Enterprise experimentation and feature flagging platform with strong statistical rigor.

feature-flags.name: Harness Feature Flags
feature-flags.description: Feature management inside the Harness software delivery platform with CI/CD integration.

feature-flags.name: DevCycle
feature-flags.description: OpenFeature-native feature flag platform with edge-evaluated flags and real-time updates.

feature-flags.name: PostHog Feature Flags
feature-flags.description: Feature flags bundled into PostHog alongside analytics, experiments, and session replay.

feature-flags.name: FeatBit
feature-flags.description: Open-source, self-hostable feature flag and experimentation platform.

feature-flags.name: Flipt
feature-flags.description: Open-source, self-hosted feature flag solution that runs entirely within your infrastructure.

feature-flags.name: Hypertune
feature-flags.description: Type-safe feature flags and config with code generation and a GraphQL-style schema.

feature-flags.name: OpenFeature
feature-flags.description: Vendor-neutral CNCF specification and SDKs that standardize feature flag evaluation.

analytics.name: Google Analytics 4
analytics.description: Google's event-based web and app analytics, free and ubiquitous with BigQuery export.

analytics.name: Matomo
analytics.description: Open-source, privacy-respecting web analytics offering full data ownership and self-hosting.

analytics.name: Pendo
analytics.description: Product analytics combined with in-app guidance, surveys, and feature adoption tracking.

analytics.name: Segment
analytics.description: Customer data platform that collects events once and routes them to analytics and warehouses.

analytics.name: RudderStack
analytics.description: Warehouse-first customer data pipeline and CDP with open-source and cloud options.

analytics.name: Snowplow
analytics.description: Behavioral data platform for collecting rich, schema-validated events into your warehouse.

analytics.name: Pirsch
analytics.description: Cookieless, privacy-friendly web analytics with a well-documented API and SDKs.

analytics.name: Cloudflare Web Analytics
analytics.description: Zero-setup, privacy-respecting web analytics free for unlimited sites on Cloudflare.

analytics.name: Simple Analytics
analytics.description: Privacy-first, cookieless website analytics with a clean single-page dashboard.

analytics.name: Tinybird
analytics.description: ClickHouse-based platform for building real-time analytics APIs over event data.
